title: PVP OPTIMIZATION
description: Best build for PVP with optimization
body:
![PVP OPTIMIZATION](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c222f38ec37fa18c9135685b51f964b7c13984aa.png)

# **Ultimate PvP Optimization**
Want to play on PvP servers without the hassle of choosing mods and resource packs? This is the simplest solution!

### Features:
_**Maximum FPS Optimization:**_
- Up to 10x performance increase
- Instant chunk loading
- Smooth animation of all actions
- Selected resource packs
  
**_Balanced Mod Set:_**
- Only proven optimizations working together
- Minimum bugs and conflicts
- Stable operation on any servers
  
### System Requirements:
- RAM: Minimum 2 GB
- Processor: Any modern
- Graphics Card: Any
  
This pack is specifically designed for PvP gameplay, where every millisecond counts. Thanks to carefully selected optimization mods, you’ll get the most stable performance even in the busiest battle moments.
